content_body: Thanks for the amazing getaway in your beautiful cabin! We had so much fun! We enjoyed dinner out at the Black Sheep - great food! The shops in downtown are one of our favorite places to visit. The fudge and milkshakes from Three Sister's fudge are so good! Beautiful cabin and furnishings. We made lots of memories! Thank you! Can't wait to return in the summer!
title: Amazing Getaway!
